name: Piper Morgan
tagline: An AI that holds the threads so you can focus on the decision
description: A multi-agent AI product management assistant with 60+ service modules, knowledge graphs, ethics enforcement, and consciousness layers. Built in public with 160+ blog posts documenting the process, methodology, and hard-won insights into human-AI collaboration.
techHighlights: Python, FastAPI, LangChain, ChromaDB, Multi-Agent Orchestration
insight: What happens when you treat AI agents like specialized team members instead of generic tools?

name: Klatch
tagline: Claude is not one assistant. It's a cast of characters you direct.
description: A local-first web app that provides a Slack-inspired interface for managing Claude conversations. Features multi-entity orchestration (Panel, Roundtable, and Directed modes), import from Claude Code and claude.ai, and a novel Agent Experience Testing methodology for diagnosing what agents know after context transitions.
techHighlights: React 19, Hono, SQLite, SSE Streaming, Anthropic SDK
insight: Scaling AI collaboration requires explicit coordination design, not just tool deployment.

name: Dynamic Atlas
tagline: 2,500 years of empires, religions, languages, and trade routes—animated
description: An interactive animated web map visualizing the rise and fall of 1,210+ political entities from 500 BCE to 1453 CE, with religion, language, and trade route overlays. Features a custom polygon morphing engine for smooth territorial transitions. A dream first pitched to Macromedia circa 1992, now finally buildable with AI.
techHighlights: Leaflet.js, Vanilla JS, Python/Shapely, GIS Processing
insight: A 30-year dream, finally buildable—because AI collapses the skill gap between vision and implementation.

name: Tectonic Globe
tagline: One billion years of continental drift in 101 seconds
description: A 3D animated visualization of Earth's tectonic plate history at 1-million-year resolution. Uses Union-Find clustering to track the largest landmass across geological time, variable pacing that slows for supercontinents, and Blender Cycles path-traced rendering. Six versions in four days.
techHighlights: Python, gplately, Blender 5.0, ffmpeg, Union-Find Clustering
insight: The most impactful improvement wasn't a clever algorithm—it was just generating more data. The jump from 5 Ma to 1 Ma resolution was a one-line change that transformed everything.

name: Cuneo
description: A single-page educational tool teaching 51 cuneiform signs across 7 thematic batches, from Cosmic Foundations to common verbs. Features a Mesopotamian clay-tablet aesthetic, progressive curriculum design, Unicode-verified accuracy, and zero JavaScript—pure HTML and CSS with Noto Sans Cuneiform rendering.
techHighlights: Single-page HTML, Noto Sans Cuneiform, Zero JavaScript
insight: AI as research partner: Unicode verification, scholarly accuracy, beautiful pedagogy—all in one session.

name: Weather
tagline: Eight ways to look at rain
description: A NOAA rainfall tracker for Palo Alto with a Python CLI and 8 interactive web visualizations: GitHub-style heatmap, cumulative curves, storm power rankings, drought streaks, weekend rain bias, rhythm sparklines, an animated fill gauge, and "Your Rain in Objects" (how many bathtubs did it rain?). Light and dark themes.
techHighlights: Python, NOAA API, HTML5 Canvas, CSS Custom Properties
insight: AI makes 'one more sketch' nearly free—so you end up with eight delightful visualizations instead of one adequate one.

name: One Job
tagline: See one task. Do one task. Feel accomplished.
description: A psychology-backed single-tasking app with a Tinder-like swipe interface. Swipe right to complete, left to defer. Supports nested sub-stacks for breaking big tasks into smaller ones. Built with systematic Claude Code methodology including TDD zones and the Excellence Flywheel approach.
insight: Full-stack development with AI requires explicit architectural documentation for cross-session continuity.

name: OptiListen
description: An iOS app that helps you become a better listener by tracking how much you speak during audio and video calls. Set a goal, start a session, and see how you do. All data stays on your phone. Built with Dan Brodnitz—the pre-AI baseline in this portfolio, showing what focused product work looks like without agent assistance.
insight: The pre-AI baseline: a focused product built the traditional way. The contrast with everything above tells the story.
